title: Amazing Abby - Keep - Acrylic Apothecary Jars (3-Piece Set), Plastic Jars with Lids, Bathroom Canisters, Vanity Organizers, Candy Buffet, Wedding Display, BPA-Free and Shatter-Proof
description:
About this item
[PERFECT QUALITY] Made of premium quality acrylic plastic. Will not shatter like glass or ceramic. BPA-free and lead-free. Safe and durable. Ideal for your use everyday and everywhere.
[MULTIPLE USES] A must-have apothecary jar set to keep various items: candies, snacks, decorative items, Q-Tips, cotton balls, beauty blenders, makeup sponges, bath salts, bath sponges, shower balls, loofah pads, laundry detergent pods. Suitable for multiple uses: candy buffet, wedding display, decorative jars, bathroom canisters, vanity organizers.
[CLASSICAL DESIGN] A simple classical design with ample capacity: 54 oz, 50 oz, 46 oz. Suitable for your own creative displays and original settings.
[GREAT GIFT] A great present for you and your loved ones. An awesome gift idea for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and any other special occasions.
[MODERN ELEGANCE] Crystal-clear and shiny. Stylish and modern design. An elegant object for any place at home.
reviews_5s: Love these jars!! They are lightweight plastic so easy to take the top off for little hands! They look like glass. Super cute!!Plastic but so cute and durable. Perfect size for a candy bar. Paired with a few small bowls.These candy jars are so cute. I have many of them. They are the only ideal size for displaying bite size candies. I like that they are acrylic and they look cute in my kitchen.Very good quality. Much better than glass. Perfect size. Not too small for a nice candy bar display. I decorated them with ribbon and it was beautiful. I'm gonna get moreI couldn’t decide between glass or plastic and these are nice and totally fine for candy, very cute. I was hesitant so wanted others to know that they are sturdy and I won’t be returning them. They are just as described.I ordered these to use on a dessert table and they were PERFECT! They are the perfect size and the quality was amazing. They are plastic but thick and sturdy. They looked great and will definitely be used over and over again! 100% worth the price. Great value!I purchased this set for a craft project to give as gifts. I needed something clear and sturdy enough to hold painted rocks. Once the rocks were placed in the jars you could see each rock clearly and the sturdy plastic containers were excellent. You could use these containers anywhere in your home. They look like glass at first glance. I would and will be placing another order to make more blessing jars!!Going to use them for a Candy Bar. They’re gonna work out really wellThese were absolutely adorable! Loved how they added a functional yet whimsical look to a farewell party. I'll be wondering another set.... definitely a great buy! I was hesitant to buy because of the scratch/scuff reviews, but I personally saw 1 scuff on mine BUT... when your candy/food is in the jar you can't tell at all! I love these a lot, and will be purchasing 1 more set. THANK YOU!!They are a little expensive for plastic, but all in all I am happy with them. They worked well for what I wanted to do.
reviews_1s:
Thin, very cheap plastic. Might be ok for another application but too cheap looking for home decor. I have other lucite containers that look modern with substantial thickness to them; these didn’t even come close. Returned.The pictures make these look a lot bigger. I needed these for an event, but they were way smaller than I expected. But I had no choice but to make it work. But other than that they look pretty decent.Received them and one was broken… didn’t know how small they were… they are too small for a wedding favorites table in my eyes… I feel it’s false advertising…My items came damaged and scratched like if it was previously usedPlay Video
This was supposed to have 3 candy jars with lids I got two jars and no lids what a freaking rip off I want my money back immediately
